# [clang] Assertion `E->isPRValue() && E->getType()->isRealFloatingType()' failed

**Author:** ym-xie
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/121927
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-01-08T03:27:09Z

## Body

code
```c
void g() {
  signed char c2 = (float __attribute__(()) _Atomic)0 + 1;
}
```
start with clang-17.0.1, but trunk and 17.0.1 have different backstrace
https://godbolt.org/z/8fjWv3nbK
Generated by fuzz
Maybe it's related to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/114439?
